member.name: T:Polyfills.Polyfill.InvocationListEnumerator`1
member.summary: Provides an enumerator for the invocation list of a delegate.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.OpenAsync(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens the entry from the zip archive.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.CreateEntryFromFileAsync(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.summary: Extracts all the files in the zip archive to a directory on the file system.

member.summary: Extracts all the files in the zip archive to a directory on the file system.

member.summary: Extracts an entry in the zip archive to a file.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.ExtractToFileAsync(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveEntry,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Extracts an entry in the zip archive to a file.

member.summary: Sets the capacity of a HashSet object to the specified number of entries, rounded up to a nearby, implementation-specific value.

member.summary: Counts the number of times any of the specified occurs in the .

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.EndsWith``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},``0)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified value appears at the end of the span.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IndexOf``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0})
member.summary: Searches for the specified value and returns the index of its first occurrence. If not found, returns -1. Values are compared using IEquatable{T}.Equals(T).

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IndexOfAny``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0})
member.summary: Searches for the first index of any of the specified values similar to calling IndexOf several times with the logical OR operator. If not found, returns -1.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Split``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},``0)
member.summary: Returns a type that allows for enumeration of each element within a split span using the provided separator character.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Split``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.ReadOnlySpan{``0})
member.summary: Returns a type that allows for enumeration of each element within a split span using the provided separator span.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SplitAny``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.ReadOnlySpan{``0})
member.summary: Returns a type that allows for enumeration of each element within a split span using any of the provided elements.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SplitAny``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.Buffers.SearchValues{``0})
member.summary: Returns a type that allows for enumeration of each element within a split span using the provided .

member.name: T:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1
member.summary: Enables enumerating each split within a that has been divided using one or more separators.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._source
member.summary: The input span being split.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._separator
member.summary: A single separator to use when is .

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._separatorBuffer
member.summary: A separator span to use when is (in which case it's treated as a single separator) or (in which case it's treated as a set of separators).

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._searchValues
member.summary: A set of separators to use when is .

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._splitMode
member.summary: Mode that dictates how the instance was configured and how its fields should be used in .

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._startCurrent
member.summary: The inclusive starting index in of the current range.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._endCurrent
member.summary: The exclusive ending index in of the current range.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1._startNext
member.summary: The index in from which the next separator search should start.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Gets an enumerator that allows for iteration over the split span.
member.returns: Returns a that can be used to iterate over the split span.

member.name: P:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.Source
member.summary: Gets the source span being enumerated.
member.returns: Returns the that was provided when creating this enumerator.

member.name: P:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.Current
member.summary: Gets the current element of the enumeration.
member.returns: Returns a instance that indicates the bounds of the current element withing the source span.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{`0},System.Buffers.SearchValues{`0})
member.summary: Initializes the enumerator for .

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{`0},System.ReadOnlySpan{`0})
member.summary: Initializes the enumerator for .
member.remarks: If is empty and is , as an optimization it will instead use with a cached for all whitespace characters.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{`0},System.ReadOnlySpan{`0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the enumerator for (or if the separator is empty).

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{`0},`0)
member.summary: Initializes the enumerator for .

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumerator`1.MoveNext
member.summary: Advances the enumerator to the next element of the enumeration.
member.returns: if the enumerator was successfully advanced to the next element; if the enumerator has passed the end of the enumeration.

member.name: T:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode
member.summary: Indicates in which mode is operating, with regards to how it should interpret its state.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.None
member.summary: Either a default was used, or the enumerator has finished enumerating and there's no more work to do.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.SingleElement
member.summary: A single T separator was provided.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.Any
member.summary: A span of separators was provided, each of which should be treated independently.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.Sequence
member.summary: The separator is a span of elements to be treated as a single sequence.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.EmptySequence
member.summary: The separator is an empty sequence, such that no splits should be performed.

member.name: F:Polyfills.Polyfill.SpanSplitEnumeratorMode.SearchValues
member.summary: A was provided and should behave the same as with but with the separators in the instance instead of in a .

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.StartsWith``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},``0)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified value appears at the start of the span.

member.summary: Gets the nanosecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.summary: Gets the nanosecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Nanosecond(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Gets the nanosecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Microseconds(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Gets the microsecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Microsecond(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets the microsecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.Microsecond(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Gets the microsecond component of the time represented by the current object.

member.summary: Sets the capacity of a Queue object to the specified number of entries.

member.summary: Sets the capacity of a Stack object to a specified number of entries.

member.summary: Replaces all instances of one string with another in part of this builder.

member.summary: Replaces all instances of one read-only character span with another in part of this builder.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IsNormalized(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Text.NormalizationForm)
member.summary: Indicates whether the specified string is in Unicode normalization form C.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.GetMethod(System.Type,System.String,System.Int32,System.Reflection.BindingFlags,System.Type[])
member.summary: Searches for the specified method whose parameters match the specified generic parameter count, argument types and modifiers, using the specified binding constraints.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IsGenericMethodParameter(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the current Type represents a type parameter in the definition of a generic method.

member.summary: Appends the specified interpolated string to this instance.

member.summary: Appends the specified interpolated string to this instance.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.AppendLine(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Text.StringBuilder.AppendInterpolatedStringHandler@)
member.summary: Appends the specified interpolated string followed by the default line terminator to the end of the current StringBuilder object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.AppendLine(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.IFormatProvider,System.Text.StringBuilder.AppendInterpolatedStringHandler@)
member.summary: Appends the specified interpolated string followed by the default line terminator to the end of the current StringBuilder object.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$8E8D5B6126DFD7E817B5797C1A237D3F.ToHexStringLower(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a subset of an array of 8-bit unsigned integers to its equivalent string representation that is encoded with lowercase hex characters. Parameters specify the subset as an offset in the input array and the number of elements in the array to convert.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$8E8D5B6126DFD7E817B5797C1A237D3F.ToHexStringLower(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts an array of 8-bit unsigned integers to its equivalent string representation that is encoded with lowercase hex characters.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$8E8D5B6126DFD7E817B5797C1A237D3F.ToHexStringLower(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Converts a span of 8-bit unsigned integers to its equivalent string representation that is encoded with lowercase hex characters.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$8E8D5B6126DFD7E817B5797C1A237D3F.TryToHexString(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Span{System.Char},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Converts a span of 8-bit unsigned integers to its equivalent span representation that is encoded with uppercase hex characters.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$8E8D5B6126DFD7E817B5797C1A237D3F.TryToHexStringLower(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Span{System.Char},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Converts a span of 8-bit unsigned integers to its equivalent span representation that is encoded with lowercase hex characters.

member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the Delegate has a single invocation target.

member.summary: Generates an infinite sequence that begins with and yields additional values each incremented by .

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$00EF3C2134D2076141FEFBF32646106D.Sequence``1(``0,``0,``0)
member.summary: Generates a sequence that begins with and yields additional values each incremented by until is reached.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllBytes(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Appends the specified byte array to the end of the file at the given path. If the file doesn't exist, this method creates a new file. If the operation is canceled, the task will return in a canceled state.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously appends the specified byte array to the end of the file at the given path. If the file doesn't exist, this method creates a new file. If the operation is canceled, the task will return in a canceled state.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllTextAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Char},System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously opens a file or creates the file if it does not already exist, appends the specified string to the file using the specified encoding, and then closes the file.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllTextAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Char},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously opens a file or creates the file if it does not already exist, appends the specified string to the file, and then closes the file.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllText(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Appends the specified string to the file, creating the file if it does not already exist.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllText(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Appends the specified string to the file, creating the file if it does not already exist.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllBytes(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Appends the specified byte array to the end of the file at the given path. If the file doesn't exist, this method creates a new file. If the operation is canceled, the task will return in a canceled state.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.WriteAllBytesAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a new file, writes the specified byte array to the file, and then closes the file. If the target file already exists, it is truncated and overwritten.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.WriteAllText(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Creates a new file, writes the specified string to the file, and then closes the file. If the target file already exists, it is truncated and overwritten.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.WriteAllText(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Creates a new file, writes the specified string to the file using the specified encoding, and then closes the file. If the target file already exists, it is truncated and overwritten.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.AppendAllBytesAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously appends the specified byte array to the end of the file at the given path. If the file doesn't exist, this method creates a new file. If the operation is canceled, the task will return in a canceled state.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$F8AA2908BAC5E2DCE9609C46C9D7AE18.Move(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Moves a specified file to a new location, providing the options to specify a new file name and to replace the destination file if it already exists.

member.summary: Creates a new according to RFC 9562, following the Version 7 format.

member.summary: Creates a new according to RFC 9562, following the Version 7 format.

member.summary: Parse a span of UTF-8 bytes into a value.

member.summary: Combines a span of strings into a path.

member.summary: Concatenates the string representations of a span of objects, using the specified separator between each member.

member.summary: Concatenates a span of strings, using the specified separator between each member.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Join(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.String})
member.summary: Concatenates a span of strings, using the specified separator between each member.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Join(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Object})
member.summary: Concatenates the string representations of a span of objects, using the specified separator between each member.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$96CB7C060F6C3BA9D49BEC9D5AB7FADB.WhenEach(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates an async-enumerable that yields completed tasks from the provided collection as they complete.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$96CB7C060F6C3BA9D49BEC9D5AB7FADB.WhenEach``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates an async-enumerable that yields completed tasks from the provided collection as they complete.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
true to overwrite existing files; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system and uses the specified character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The encoding to use when reading entry names in this archive.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system and uses the specified character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The encoding to use when reading entry names in this archive.
true to overwrite existing files; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IO.Compression.CompressionLevel,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory and uses the specified compression level.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The compression level to use.
true to include the directory name from sourceDirectoryName at the root of the archive; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IO.Compression.CompressionLevel,System.Boolean,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory, uses the specified compression level and character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The compression level to use.
true to include the directory name from sourceDirectoryName at the root of the archive; false otherwise.
The encoding to use when reading or writing entry names in this archive.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.DebuggerDisableUserUnhandledExceptionsAttribute
member.summary: If a .NET Debugger is attached that supports the Debugger.BreakForUserUnhandledException(System.Exception) API, the debugger won't break on user-unhandled exceptions when the exception is caught by a method with this attribute, unless Debugger.BreakForUserUnhandledException(System.Exception) is called.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureGuardAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the specified public static boolean get-only property guards access to the specified feature.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureGuardAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified feature type.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureGuardAttribute.FeatureType
member.summary: The type that represents the feature guarded by the property.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute
member.summary: [AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Property, Inherited = false)]

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified feature switch name.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute.SwitchName
member.summary: The name of the feature switch that provides the value for the specified property.

member.name: T:System.Threading.Lock
member.summary: Provides a way to get mutual exclusion in regions of code between different threads. A lock may be held by one thread at a time.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.Enter
member.summary: Enters the lock. Once the method returns, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.TryEnter
member.summary: Tries to enter the lock without waiting. If the lock is entered, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.TryEnter(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Tries to enter the lock, waiting for roughly the specified duration. If the lock is entered, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.TryEnter(System.Int32)
member.summary: Tries to enter the lock, waiting for roughly the specified duration. If the lock is entered, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.Exit
member.summary: Exits the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.EnterScope
member.summary: Enters the lock and returns a that may be disposed to exit the lock. Once the method returns, the calling thread would be the only thread that holds the lock. This method is intended to be used along with a language construct that would automatically dispose the , such as with the C# using statement.

member.name: T:System.Threading.Lock.Scope
member.summary: A disposable structure that is returned by , which when disposed, exits the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.Scope.#ctor(System.Threading.Lock)
member.summary: A disposable structure that is returned by , which when disposed, exits the lock.

member.name: M:System.Threading.Lock.Scope.Dispose
member.summary: Exits the lock.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the priority of a member in overload resolution. When unspecified, the default priority is 0.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.OverloadResolutionPriorityAttribute.Priority
member.summary: The priority of the member.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ParamCollectionAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that a method allows a variable number of arguments in its invocation.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.ValueSplitEnumerator
member.summary: Represents an enumerator containing the set of successful matches found by iteratively applying a regular expression pattern to the input span.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the BuildReservedFileNameRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.BuildReservedFileNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_781DCA66BA229A861353E0487F79173CA075B68E2FDEF6A1762A5C67754BC9D6(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [^\t\n\r -\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD].

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 3 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_260000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\t\n\r !\"#$%&'()*+,-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".

member.name: T:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared
member.summary: Shared implementation of the XXH3 hash algorithm for 64-bit in XxHash3 and version.

member.name: P:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.DefaultSecret
member.summary: Gets the default secret for when no seed is provided.
member.remarks: This is the same as a custom secret derived from a seed of 0.

member.name: M:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.Rrmxmx(System.UInt64,System.UInt32)
member.summary: This is a stronger avalanche, preferable when input has not been previously mixed.

member.name: M:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.Multiply32To64(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Calculates a 32-bit to 64-bit long multiply.

member.name: M:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.Avalanche(System.UInt64)
member.summary: This is a fast avalanche stage, suitable when input bits are already partially mixed.

member.name: M:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.Multiply64To128ThenFold(System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Calculates a 64-bit to 128-bit multiply, then XOR folds it.

member.name: M:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.Accumulate(System.UInt64*,System.Byte*,System.Byte*,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Optimized version of looping over .

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.Accumulators
member.summary: The accumulators. Length is .

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.Secret
member.summary: Used to store a custom secret generated from a seed. Length is .

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.Buffer
member.summary: The internal buffer. Length is .

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.BufferedCount
member.summary: The amount of memory in .

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.StripesProcessedInCurrentBlock
member.summary: Number of stripes processed in the current block.

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.TotalLength
member.summary: Total length hashed.

member.name: F:System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State.Seed
member.summary: The seed employed (possibly 0).

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Abstractions.TrxReportEngine.BuildReservedFileNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i:^(CON|PRN|AUX|NUL|COM[1-9]|LPT[1-9]|CLOCK\\$)(\\..*)?)$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 7 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Xx].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [1-9].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [1-9].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match '$'.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Abstractions.TrxReportEngine.BuildInvalidXmlCharReplace
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^\\x09\\x0A\\x0D\\x20-\\uD7FF\\uE000-\\uFFFD]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^\t\n\r -\uD7FF\uE000-\uFFFD].

member.name: T:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.TestingPlatformBuilderHook
member.summary: This class is used by Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild to hook into the Testing Platform Builder to add TrxReport support.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.TestingPlatformBuilderHook.AddExtensions(Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.ITestApplicationBuilder,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds TrxReport support to the Testing Platform Builder.
member.param: The test application builder.
The command line arguments.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.InvalidTestApplicationBuilderType
member.summary: TRX report generator only works with builders of type 'Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.TestApplicationBuilder'

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolBaselineFileOptionDescription
member.summary: The baseline TRX file

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolBothFilesMustBeSpecified
member.summary: '--{0}' and '--{1}' must both be specified

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolDescription
member.summary: This tool allows to compare and highlights differences between 2 TRX reports

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolDisplayName
member.summary: TRX comparer tool

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolOptionExpectsSingleArgument
member.summary: '--{0}' expects a single trx file path as argument

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxComparerToolOtherFileOptionDescription
member.summary: The TRX file to compare with the baseline

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxFileExistsAndWillBeOverwritten
member.summary: Warning: Trx file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportArtifactDescription
member.summary: Test session

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportArtifactDisplayName
member.summary: TRX Report

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportFileNameExtensionIsNotTrx
member.summary: '--report-trx-filename' file name argument must end with '.trx' (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportFileNameOptionDescription
member.summary: The name of the generated TRX report

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportFileNameRequiresTrxReport
member.summary: '--report-trx-filename' requires '--report-trx' to be enabled

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportFileNameShouldNotContainPath
member.summary: file name argument must not contain path (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportFrameworkDoesNotSupportTrxReportCapability
member.summary: The test framework '{0}' with UID '{1}' does not support the 'ITrxReportCapability' leading to missing or incomplete TRX reports

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportGeneratorBeforeTestHostProcessStartAsyncNotCalled
member.summary: Method 'BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync' must be called before 'OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync'

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportGeneratorDescription
member.summary: Produce a TRX report for the current test session

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportGeneratorDisplayName
member.summary: TRX report generator

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportGeneratorMissingTrxNamedPipeEnvironmentVariable
member.summary: Required environment variable '{0}' is missing for TRX report generator

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportIsNotValidForDiscovery
member.summary: '--report-trx' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.TrxReportOptionDescription
member.summary: Enable generating TRX report

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReport.Resources.ExtensionResources.UnsupportedRequestTypeErrorMessage
member.summary: Requests of type '{0}' is not supported

member.name: T:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReportExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding TRX report generation to a test application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.TrxReportExtensions.AddTrxReportProvider(Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.ITestApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds TRX report generation to a test application.
member.param: The test application builder.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.IPC.NamedPipeServer.InternalLoopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 4 bytes = message size ------- Payload ------- 4 bytes = serializer id x bytes = object buffer.

member.name: T:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128
member.summary: Provides an implementation of the XXH128 hash algorithm for generating a 128-bit hash.
member.remarks: For methods that persist the computed numerical hash value as bytes, the value is written in the Big Endian byte order.

member.name: F:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.HashLengthInBytes
member.summary: XXH128 produces 16-byte hashes.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the default seed value 0.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the specified seed.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.#ctor(System.IO.Hashing.XxHashShared.State)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the state from another instance.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.Hash(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Computes the XXH128 hash of the provided data.
member.param: The data to hash.
member.returns: The XXH128 128-bit hash code of the provided data.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.Hash(System.Byte[],System.Int64)
member.summary: Computes the XXH128 hash of the provided data using the provided seed.
member.param: The data to hash.
The seed value for this hash computation.
member.returns: The XXH128 128-bit hash code of the provided data.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.Hash(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Int64)
member.summary: Computes the XXH128 hash of the provided data into the provided using the optionally provided .
member.param: The data to hash.
The buffer that receives the computed 128-bit hash code.
The seed value for this hash computation. The default is zero.
member.returns: The number of bytes written to .

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.TryHash(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Int32@,System.Int64)
member.summary: Attempts to compute the XXH128 hash of the provided data into the provided using the optionally provided .
member.param: The data to hash.
The buffer that receives the computed 128-bit hash code.
When this method returns, contains the number of bytes written to .
The seed value for this hash computation. The default is zero.
member.returns: if is long enough to receive the computed hash value (16 bytes); otherwise, .

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.HashToUInt128(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int64)
member.summary: Computes the XXH128 hash of the provided data.
member.param: The data to hash.
The seed value for this hash computation. The default is zero.
member.returns: The computed XXH128 hash.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.Append(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Appends the contents of to the data already processed for the current hash computation.
member.param: The data to process.

member.name: M:TestFx.Hashing.XxHash128.GetCurrentHashAsUInt128
member.summary: Gets the current computed hash value without modifying accumulated state.
member.returns: The hash value for the data already provided.
